name: Clay Labs Inc.
one_liner: Clay is an AI-powered GTM development environment that helps sales and marketing teams automate data enrichment, lead generation, and personalized outreach by combining 150+ data providers with AI agents and workflow automation.
key_products: Clay Signals (intent data via Avenue acquisition)

ambiguities: Total funding reported as $204M by TechCrunch/press releases and $210M by Tracxn — $204M figure used as it comes from the company's official Series C press coverage; discrepancy likely due to inclusion/exclusion of the May 2025 Sequoia tender offer (~$20M).

Headcount of 1,167 is sourced from Tracxn (as of Feb 2026); GetLatka estimated ~1,000 employees as of Dec 2025 — figures are broadly consistent but sourced from third-party trackers, not the company directly.
Series C date reported as August 5, 2025 by TechCrunch; Tracxn lists June 12, 2025 — August 2025 date used as it aligns with the official press announcement.
Clay's website homepage notes employees may sell shares at a $5B valuation (secondary market signal), but no formal funding round at that valuation has been confirmed as of research date.
